title: pelargonium × nitens
intro: Pelargonium × nitens, also known as the White Rose or Peppermint Geranium, is a hybrid plant species within the pelargonium family, characterized by its distinctive white and pink flowers. The plant's leaves and flowers are used in herbal medicine due to their anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations, wounds, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Pelargonium × nitens include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome (IBS). Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas, tinctures, and essential oils, can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
